summary: Aligned tri-view frontend mode semantics by enabling form mode in available modes, fixing tree/list guard mismatch for batch actions, and adding form-mode route handoff from action shell to model-form.
risks: Browser-level tri-view interaction replay is still pending; this batch is verified at contract-consumer logic + build level.
